message:
test: add 7 new test suites for scheduler, obligation, DPOR, and replay subsystems

New E2E and integration test files covering recent feature additions:

1. tests/allocation_audit.rs (1057 lines, bd-3bjjp) — Zero-alloc
   guards for scheduler and cancellation hot paths using a custom
   global allocator to count heap allocations during critical sections.

2. tests/cache_aware_queues.rs (929 lines) — Cache-aware queue and
   intrusive heap tests verifying CachePadded alignment, false-sharing
   prevention, and IntrusivePriorityHeap correctness under concurrent
   access patterns.

3. tests/cap_obligation_compile_fail.rs (413 lines) — Compile-fail
   tests verifying that capability-based obligation tokens enforce
   type-level safety (double-send, forged proofs, etc.).

4. tests/dpor_coverage.rs (873 lines) — DPOR coverage and
   backtracking regression tests: sleep set optimization, HB-race
   detection, estimated class counts, and coverage comparison between
   DPOR and baseline exploration.

5. tests/leak_checker_integration.rs (712 lines) — Full integration
   tests for the static obligation leak checker: BodyBuilder,
   ObligationAnalyzer, obligation_body!/assert_no_leaks!/
   assert_has_leaks! macros, and realistic patterns (channel sends,
   lease/ack combos, I/O with timeout, cancellation).

6. tests/property_cap_obligation.rs (622 lines) — Property-based
   tests for capability obligation system correctness.

7. tests/replay_e2e_suite.rs (706 lines, bd-x333q) — Comprehensive
   trace replay E2E tests: record→normalize→replay→assert equivalence,
   cross-seed determinism, file persistence roundtrip, streaming
   replay with checkpoints, log-rich divergence diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
